⭕️ The IDF launched an operation, beginning a few days ago, in the Beaufort Ridge and Wadi al-Saluki area in southern Lebanon in order to dismantle terrorist infrastructure, eliminate terrorists and remove direct threats to Israeli civilians.

The operation is focused on establishing operational control of the Beaufort Ridge and the Wadi al-Saluki area, as well as degrading Hezbollah & dismantling terrorist infrastructure that was established on the ridge under Iranian direction. 

From Beaufort Ridge, Hezbollah terrorists managed military & combat activities and carried out numerous attacks.

The IDF has crossed the Litani River and expanded its operations against Hezbollah targets north of the river. The operation is currently expanding to additional areas.
